context: Tests whether the CallKit skill corrects answer-action timing, audio lifecycle, hangup routing, and encrypted VoIP filtering scope.

checklist.name: Answer fulfillment
checklist.description: Explains that CXAnswerCallAction should be fulfilled after the server/media connection is established and failed or ended if connection fails.

checklist.name: Audio lifecycle
checklist.description: States that the audio engine should start only after provider(_:didActivate:) and should stop on provider(_:didDeactivate:).

checklist.name: Hangup routing
checklist.description: Routes hangups and call-detail updates over the existing app-server connection after the initial VoIP push instead of sending more VoIP pushes.

checklist.name: Encrypted metadata scope
checklist.description: Limits CXProvider.reportNewIncomingVoIPPushPayload to notification service extensions that decrypt payloads when the server cannot tell whether content is a VoIP call or other data.

checklist.name: Filtering entitlement
checklist.description: Mentions that reportNewIncomingVoIPPushPayload requires the com.apple.developer.usernotifications.filtering entitlement.

checklist.name: No generic APNs guide
checklist.description: Does not turn the answer into a generic APNs notification permission or rich-notification guide.
